# Notes

- The screenshot appears to be a person taking a mirror selfie in a clothing store. Any small text (e.g., on clothing tags) is too unclear to extract accurately.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person stands in front of a large mirror in what appears to be a clothing store. They are wearing a white crewneck sweatshirt with a small red logo on the left chest, and loose-fitting brown trousers. White sneakers with white laces complete the outfit. The person has dark hair and is wearing white over-ear headphones, holding a smartphone in their right hand to take the selfie.

The background is a retail environment. To the left, racks of clothing are visible, with garments in various colors, including pink and white. To the right, more clothing racks are displayed, with a focus on darker items like black and white tops. A red rope barrier is also visible on the right side of the image. The floor is tiled with large, light gray square tiles. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a retail setting, with overhead lights casting a soft glow. The mirror itself is large and framed in a neutral, light color, and it reflects the person and the store environment, creating a sense of depth with multiple reflections. The overall mood is casual and everyday, a typical mirror selfie taken while shopping. The color palette is dominated by neutral tones of white, gray, and brown, with pops of color from the clothing racks in the background and the red logo on the sweatshirt.
